prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Chevrolet LT5 (90° V8, 370ci / 6.1L)** from the C7 Corvette Z06, retaining the original M6GT's dry-sump lubrication system but upgrading to a **Dry-Sump Systems Inc. 6-stage pump** with billet aluminum scavenge and pressure sections for sustained 9,000 RPM operation. The LT5 is modified with **JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs (13.5:1 CR)**, **Manley Pro Series titanium valves**, and **Crower billet steel connecting rods** to handle 800+ HP on **VP Racing Fuels Q16** (116 octane).

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbocharger** (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a **Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** to eliminate compressor surge. The turbo is paired with a **custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold** (equal-length, 1.75" primaries) fabricated by **Burns Stainless** and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise 28-32 psi mapping. Intercooling is handled by a **PWR 4.5-core bar-and-plate intercooler** with **AEM 340lph fuel pumps** and **ID1700x injectors** for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (2-way adjustable compression/rebound) and **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs** to counteract the M6GT's 50/50 weight distribution. The rear subframe is reinforced with **VAC Motorsports billet aluminum bushings** and a **custom Watts linkage** (fabricated by **Autosport Labs**) to eliminate rear toe compliance under hard acceleration. Braking is upgraded to **AP Racing CP9660 6-piston calipers** with **380mm 2-piece rotors** (floating, slotted) and **Ferodo DS3000 pads** for endurance racing.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-M6GT widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 3-piece fender flares with integrated air vents) paired with a **custom 3D-printed front splitter** (ABS plastic, reinforced with carbon fiber weave) designed in **Siemens NX** for optimal downforce at 180+ mph. The rear diffuser is a **Rocket Bunny RB-M6GT unit** (carbon fiber, 3-stage Gurney flaps) with **Vortex Generators** to reduce drag by 12%.

Custom **BBS LM-RS II wheels** (18x12 +25 front, 18x13 +35 rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (345/35/18 rear) and **HRE FlowForm FF01 centers** for weight reduction. The wheels are finished in **BBS Gold with matte black hardware** and feature **Dymag carbon fiber center locks** for rapid tire changes. The entire underbody is treated with **Aerocatch flush-mount fasteners** and **Zircotec ThermoHold thermal coating** to reduce heat soak.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harnesses) and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, 350mm diameter) mounted on a **NRG Innovations quick-release hub**. The dashboard is replaced with a **Motec C187 digital dash** (CAN bus integration) and a **custom aluminum center console** (CNC-machined, anodized gold) housing **AEM X-Series gauges** (oil pressure, fuel pressure, boost). The roll cage is a **SCCA-legal 8-point chromoly unit** (TIG-welded, powder-coated matte black) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and **Sabelt HANS-compatible mounts**.
